name: Citrus Shrimp and Scallops
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare 12 fresh or frozen large Shrimp, peeled and deveined (about 1/2 lb total).
2. Halve any large scallops.
3. Place scallops and shrimp in a plastic bag set in a deep bowl.
4. For the marinade, combine orange peel, orange juice, soy sauce, gingerroot, garlic, and red pepper.
5. Pour the marinade over the seafood.
6. Seal the bag and marinate in the refrigerator for 30 minutes.
7. Drain, reserving the marinade.
8. If using fresh pea pods, cook them in boiling water for about 2 minutes; then drain. Alternatively, thaw and drain frozen pea pods.
9. Wrap one pea pod around each shrimp.
10. Thread the pea pods and shrimp onto four 10-12 inch skewers alternately with scallops and orange wedges.
11. Grill the kabobs on an uncovered grill directly over medium-hot coals for 5 minutes.
12. Turn and brush with marinade. Grill for 5-7 more minutes, or until the shrimp turn pink and the scallops are opaque. Brush occasionally with marinade.
Per serving: 133 calories, 22 g protein, 7 g carbohydrates, 1 g fat, 105 mg cholesterol, 305 mg sodium, 380 mg potassium.
